mapper.update: UPDATE comments set DEL_YN = #{delYn}, deleted_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE COMMENT_ID = #{commentId}
mapper.select: SELECT c.comment_id, c.post_id, c.user_email, u.nickname, c.parent_comment_id, c.content, c.del_yn, c.created_at, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM likes l WHERE l.target_code = '02' AND l.target_id = c.comment_id) AS like_count FROM comments c JOIN users u ON c.user_email = u.email WHERE c.post_id = #{postId} AND c.del_yn = 'N' ORDER BY c.created_at ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comments (post_id, user_email, parent_comment_id, content, del_yn, created_at) VALUES (#{postId}, #{userEmail}, #{parent_comment_id}, #{content}, 'N', NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE comments SET del_yn = 'Y', deleted_at = NOW() WHERE comment_id = #{commentId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO likes (target_code, target_id, user_email) VALUES ('02', #{commentId}, #{userEmail})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM likes WHERE target_code = '02' AND target_id = #{commentId} AND user_email = #{userEmail}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM likes WHERE target_code = '02' AND target_id = #{commentId} AND user_email = #{userEmail}
